inspectedFor385Selection.scopeDescription: The 436 pixels selected by the best FOR-385 metadata predicate, analyzed only as diagnostic input.

discriminatorCandidates.description: Keeps the two observed useful local fringe zones using stroke band coordinates and partial coverage lanes.
Tests whether the useful round-cap lane is separable by cap metadata and the higher alpha lane.
Uses only band edge distance plus the FOR-385 partial alpha lane.
Requires the high alpha lane with no partial orthogonal coverage neighbors.
Checks whether round-cap metadata and local fringe position are enough without the butt-bevel lane.
Looks for isolated edge pixels by combining partial alpha with sparse orthogonal coverage.

bestDiscriminatorCandidate.runtimeBlocker: FOR-386 is diagnostic-only; a separate correction ticket must prove the candidate outside this audit and keep full-scene/fallback stability.

classificationReason: The best discriminator keeps all 8 useful pixels but still includes regressed pixels from the FOR-385 selection.
nextMove: Do not enable the correction. Add or export a narrower renderer metadata signal that explains the remaining selected regressions. Best candidate: source-fringe-band-local-window.
